programme.title: The Making Of: Olympics, Ep 2
programme.desc: A four-part special that pays homage to the 2022 Olympic games' unique environment. Each of the Olympic Zones is full of engineering and technical marvels, and we meet the designers behind them.

programme.title: History Greatest Escapes, Ep 5
programme.desc: Allied prisoners used all kinds of forgery and engineering tactics to tunnel out of a German Prisoner of War camp. Almost all were caught and 50 were executed, but three made their way to freedom.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries S3, Ep 2
programme.desc: An infamous Cold War cold case: nine hikers were found mutilated on a remote mountain slope. For over 60 years, authorities and amateurs have been trying to figure out what happened.

programme.title: Ride N' Seek: Malaysia, Ep 3
programme.desc: Jaime goes back in time to explore old war relics in Kelantan. She tries her hand at Wau (kite-flying), songket and batik-making. She also tours the city of Kota Bharu and eats a giant catfish.

programme.title: Ride N' Seek: Malaysia, Ep 4
programme.desc: Jaime explores historic George Town before heading to Batu Feringhi beaches to taste Asam Laksa. In Ipoh she drives a hybrid 4x4 Rainforest Challenger and heads to Fraser's Hill for a colonial experience.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America, Ep 2

programme.desc: Allied prisoners used all kinds of forgery and engineering tactics to tunnel out of a German Prisoner of War camp. Almost all were caught and 50 were executed, but three made their way to freedom.

programme.title: Ride N' Seek: Malaysia, Ep 3
programme.desc: Jaime goes back in time to explore old war relics in Kelantan. She tries her hand at Wau (kite-flying), songket and batik-making. She also tours the city of Kota Bharu and eats a giant catfish.

programme.title: Ride N' Seek: Malaysia, Ep 4
programme.desc: Jaime explores historic George Town before heading to Batu Feringhi beaches to taste Asam Laksa. In Ipoh she drives a hybrid 4x4 Rainforest Challenger and heads to Fraser's Hill for a colonial experience.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island S9, Ep 7
programme.desc: The team uncovers evidence that the stone road in the swamp was built long before the discovery of the original Money Pit, just as the future of archaeology investigation on the island is threatened.

programme.title: The Making Of: Olympics, Ep 2
programme.desc: A four-part special that pays homage to the 2022 Olympic games' unique environment. Each of the Olympic Zones is full of engineering and technical marvels, and we meet the designers behind them.

programme.title: Ancient Empires, Ep 2
programme.desc: Overcoming overwhelming odds fighting throughout the Mediterranean, Caesar's decisive actions bring him massive success and make him the most powerful man in the world.

programme.title: More Power, Ep 2
programme.desc: Tim Allen, Richard Karn and April Wilkerson dissect the mighty power of blades. Starting in Tim's workshop, they show what happens when a hand gets caught in a garbage disposal.

programme.title: Food That Built World S3, Ep 8
programme.desc: Small town farmer Orville Redenbacher has a lifelong dream of creating the perfect popcorn kernel, leading to the first significant development of popcorn, eventually pitting him against industry rivals.

programme.title: Mountain Men S11, Ep 151
programme.desc: In Idaho, Kidd and Harry Youren use explosives to battle a deep freeze to protect their cattle's drinking supply. In Montana, Jake Herak's young pups learn a big lesson in lion hunting.

programme.title: Alone: Frozen S1, Ep 4
programme.desc: The harsh Labrador environment has a profound effect on the participants' mindset and their strategies, even proving too much for one participant to overcome.

programme.title: Swamp People S13, Ep 8
programme.desc: The Landrys fish in a dangerous sinkhole that could swallow them whole. The Edgars hunt down the menacing beasts breaking into local fishermen's crab traps.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America, Ep 1
programme.desc: The cast of Pawn Stars are leaving Vegas and hitting the road to meet with collectors from all around the country.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle S1, Ep 2
programme.desc: The team searches for the remains of a pirate fleet of ships that vanished suddenly in the Bermuda Triangle, as if swallowed by the ocean. Could a geological anomaly be the source of these whirlpools?

programme.title: The UnXplained S3, Ep 2
programme.desc: For thousands of years, people have believed in the existence of Satan, the embodiment of evil. Some believe he has the power to possess souls and create mayhem amongst humanity. But is Satan a myth?

programme.title: Ancient Empires, Ep 3
programme.desc: The enigmatic Egyptian Queen's untold true story is one of a ruthless genius, doing anything necessary to cling onto power in the face of an aggressively expanding Roman Empire.

programme.title: Secret Skinwalker... S4, Ep 11
programme.desc: When the team performs a hi-tech experiment at the Triangle, it leads to a stunning revelation that may explain the strange phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: More Power, Ep 5
programme.desc: Tim Allen, Richard Karn and April Wilkerson explore the unexpectedly riveting world of screws, nails and other fasteners.

programme.title: More Power, Ep 6
programme.desc: Tim Allen, Richard Karn and April Wilkerson get carried away with the tools and machines used to lift and load. High above the Port of Los Angeles, they take turns operating a massive ship-loading crane.

programme.title: The UnXplained S3, Ep 2

Blue Green Ghost
programme.desc: Based on a popular video game of the same name, six high school students are trapped in an abandoned haunted house where they are being pursued by a creature called Ao Oni.

programme.title: The Night Sitter
programme.desc: A con artist poses as a babysitter to steal from a wealthy occult enthusiast. One of the kids she's sitting unwittingly summons a trio of witches known as The Three Mothers.

programme.title: Jacqueline Comes Home: Chion
programme.desc: Based on a true crime in 1997, the story is about an unknown assailant kidnapping two sisters, Jacqueline and Marijoy Chiong. This is one of the most shocking cases of rape and murder in Philippines history.

programme.title: The Living Dead
programme.desc: This is a tale of a robbery descending into chaos! As the robbers take refuge from the police in an old castle, they discover hidden treasures and decide on one last heist!

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Miss Qiao had died in vain and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll. Miss Qiao's spirit is revived to take revenge and a series of horrible events begins to happen.

programme.title: The Occupant

programme.title: Hollow
programme.desc: Beth, an old woman with early signs of Alzheimer's disease, moves in to a new house with her daughter's family. Despite her worsening symptoms, Beth uncovers something sinister observing her every move.

programme.title: Model Family, Ep 5
programme.desc: A single-parent family move into a new neighbourhood where everyone's life seems perfect. But, nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Model Family, Ep 6
programme.desc: A single-parent family move into a new neighbourhood where everyone's life seems perfect. But, nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Ex Girlfriend's Ghost
programme.desc: Vicky and his wife Angel cast their first film and a talented young girl enrols to approach Vicky. Her intention however, is to take revenge on Vicky for causing her sister's death.

programme.title: I'm Livin' It
programme.desc: Once a successful banker, Bowen now spends his nights in a 24-hour fast food joint where he meets a group of homeless people. Together they strive to get themselves out of rock bottom.

programme.title: As Tears Go By
programme.desc: Fly is a mobster who infuriates a mob boss one day and got beaten up badly. He then takes up a fatal task to make amends.

programme.title: A Cool Fish
programme.desc: In this dark-comedy, cop-turned-security guard Ma faces the ultimate challenge when his boss mysteriously disappears and his paralyzed sister makes a morbid deal with the armed bandits who abduct her.

programme.title: Adventure Of The King
programme.desc: Zhengde flees the palace after his mother orders him to marry an ugly princess. He disguises as a commoner and escapes with his advisors, but a gambling mishap causes them to part ways.

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: Brilliant director Sun Chung and the majestic Ti Lung reunite for a thriller about an aging fighter who relives his violent past mistakes through a streetwise kid.

programme.title: Song Of Spring
programme.desc: An 85-year-old mother lives with her 65-year-old daughter who is suffering from Alzheimer's disease. Though the elderly mother has to shoulder the burden of a caregiver, she still wants to be with her daughter forever.

programme.title: Black Ransom
programme.desc: Mann is forced to return to his former glory when he is assigned to investigate a former police inspector suspected to be kidnapping mafia bosses and demanding ransoms in exchange for their lives.

programme.title: Deception Of The Novelist
programme.desc: A self-help book author Xu lives happily with his wife Jeana and their son. However, when a voluptuous and seductive tenant rents their apartment upstairs, Xu's life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Project Gutenberg
programme.desc: The Hong Kong police hunt for a counterfeiting gang led by a mastermind known as Painter. In an effort to find Painter's real identity, the police recruits artist Lee Man to assist in solving the case.

programme.title: Love Never Ends
programme.desc: The story of two lonely and impoverished elderly lovers at the end of their lives.

programme.title: Endless Battle
programme.desc: This is a story about two brothers. Both are involved in a drug cartel¿s turf battle and during an escort mission, Zhong discovers his brother¿s hidden identity. This leads to an endless battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Missbehavior
programme.desc: Missbehavior follows a group of friends, formerly close but now somewhat estranged, as they unite to help out one of their own who is in trouble at work.

programme.title: Shock Wave 2
programme.desc: A series of bomb explosions is causing fear in Hong Kong. Former bomb disposal officer Feng is found in coma at the crime scene and becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Lost Love
programme.desc: Mei tries to get over the death of her young son by becoming a foster parent. For 13 years, Mei's dedication to the foster child leads her to neglect her husband and the true needs of the child.

programme.title: Love After Love
programme.desc: Wei Long travels to HK from Shanghai to pursue her education. As she struggles financially, she becomes her aunt's puppet to lure rich men. When Wei Long falls for playboy, George, she sinks in a life of depravity.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: Anita Yuan Yung-yi stars as an illegitimate daughter who inadvertently finds a pearl with a genie in it. Michael Wong is the genie who gives her three wishes, leading to a lot of hilarity and even a little heartbreak.

programme.title: Still Human
programme.desc: Evelyn, a Filipino domestic helper, moves to Hong Kong to work for Cheong Wing, a divorcee paralyzed in a construction accident. The two discover shared humanity that helps them face life's mounting hardships.

programme.title: Love Revolution
programme.desc: Ai Yoshida will do anything for love, including traveling to Thailand with her boyfriend. When her boyfriend is kidnapped by the local gangster after a brawl at a bar, Ai sets out on rescue mission.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, the nerdy son of a business tycoon, and his friend seek love in Hawaii. Returning home in disappointment, they accidentally find themselves in a messy identity swap.

programme.title: The Narrow Road
programme.desc: A small cleaning company owner hits tough times during the pandemic. In need of an assistant, he hires a young single mother who unexpectedly helps him solve many difficulties at work.

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: The movie is based on the true story of Sichuan Airlines Flight 8633 incident on 14 May 2018. When the cockpit windshield shatters after takeoff, the Captain manages to land the airplane safely.

programme.title: The Way We Are
programme.desc: Kwai is a middle-aged widow who works hard in a neighbourhood supermarket to support herself and her son. When an elderly woman moved in to the neighbourhood, Kwai strikes up a friendship with her.

programme.title: Born To Fly
programme.desc: Lei Yu has officially become the new generation of Chinese test pilots after rounds of strict selection. Captain Zhang Ting leads Lei Yu and other pilots to test the latest fighter jets.

programme.title: Shadows
programme.desc: Ching is a forensic psychiatrist who has the power to enter a person's subconscious mind. In her latest case, she suspects that another psychiatrist is responsible for a brutal murder case involving a social worker.

programme.title: Caught In Time
programme.desc: Detective Zhong Cheng leads a task force in pursuit of Eagle, a criminal gang led by Zhang Sun. A decade later, Zhong Cheng realizes that his time is almost up to solve the case.

programme.title: Love Is Cold
programme.desc: In the mid-1990s in Macau, a teenage boy and girl kill someone and clean up the crime scene together. They are instantly attracted to each other when they met but who did they kill and will they get away with it?

programme.title: A Witness Out Of The Blue
programme.desc: The police suspects that a jewel thief, found dead in his unit, is killed by his gang leader. In this complicated case, the police's only witness is a talking parrot from the crime scene.

programme.title: Sex And The Beauties
programme.desc: It is said that Hong Kong is a sexy and sexual city where life is breathtakingly fast but glamorous. Fear of marriage, single and successful psychiatrist, Selina and other beauties seek for love and happy endings.

programme.title: Far Far Away
programme.desc: A 28-year-old IT geek has only been in love once. Surprisingly, he ends up getting romantically involved with five different women this year and they all live in far flung areas of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Integrity
programme.desc: Chen lines up a key witness to testify against a tobacco trading company CEO. When neither of them shows up on the day of the hearing, he must team up with his ex-wife to launch an investigation.

programme.title: Septet: The Story Of Hong Kong
programme.desc: Seven of Hong Kong's most revered directors, all with distinctly unique styles, come together for the first time to compose a symphony of stories for their city from the 50s to the future.

programme.title: Somewhere Winter
programme.desc: The film follows the love story of a university student, An Ran and a Taiwanese man, Qi Xiao. They met and fell in love with each other in Beijing in 1991, at a concert by Chyi Chin, a Taiwanese singer.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing and his brother arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune and befriending a powerful mobster Tam. Ma's fortune rises but he must overcome the corruption and violence to survive.

programme.title: Hong Kong Family
programme.desc: Eight years ago, the family was torn apart during a combative winter solstice dinner. Eight years later, their cousin returns from England and seeks to reunite the family for another winter solstice dinner.

programme.title: Cliff Walkers
programme.desc: This film follows four Communist Party special agents who embark on a secret operation in the Japanese puppet state of Manchukuo in 1932.

programme.title: Hero 2022
programme.desc: Set in 2020 during the outbreak of COVID-19, the movie features interconnected stories of three women's lives as they navigate the uncertain future amongst their respective friends and families.

programme.title: From Vegas To Macau 3
programme.desc: Ken holds a wedding ceremony in Macau for his daughter Rainbow. However, an explosion during the wedding causes Rainbow to fall into coma, while Ken and his friend Mark, are accused of engulfing some illicit money.

programme.title: Song Of Spring
programme.desc: An 85-year-old mother lives with her 65-year-old daughter who is suffering from Alzheimer's disease. Though the elderly mother has to shoulder the burden of a caregiver, she still wants to be with her daughter forever.

programme.title: The Rescue
programme.desc: An emergency occurs on an offshore drilling rig that would cause it to capsize and sink. The Emergency Response Unit races against the clock in a chopper rescue mission amidst dangerous explosions and fire.

programme.title: All U Need Is Love
programme.desc: This film features an all-star ensemble cast starring for free, with the story revolving around a group of hotel guests placed under quarantine in Hong Kong.

programme.title: In The Mood For Love
programme.desc: In the Mood for Love' is Wong Kar-Wai's most acclaimed feature, navigating the subtle love relationship between Chow Mo Wan and Su Li Zhen after both discover their spouses are having an affair.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: The movie depicts how the 'fathers' forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the 'fighting' spirit through generations.

programme.title: Princess & 7 Kung Fu Masters
programme.desc: When warlord Lam refuses to side with the Japanese, an agent is assigned to take over his army and kill his daughter using ninjutsu. But, Lam's daughter escapes and seeks help from the seven masters.

programme.title: One And Only
programme.desc: Veteran street dancer Ding Lei, invites passionate street dancer, Chen Shuo to his dance club. Chen pursues his dream to perform but discovers that Ding has invited him for another reason.

programme.title: Bodyguards And Assassins
programme.desc: Chinese revolutionary leader Sun Yat-sen returned to Hong Kong for further plans of overthrowing the Qing Dynasty. Businessman Li and Chan found 4 bodyguards to protect Mr Sun for the assassination of the Qing Dynasty.

programme.title: The Sparring Partner
programme.desc: A young man partners with his friend to murder and dismember his parents. Pleading not guilty, defense attorneys face each other as nine jurors grapple with the truth.

programme.title: Hell Hole
programme.desc: About three horror stories in different era: a pregnant woman haunted by a ghost, a boy commits suicide, and some company staff are haunted after they open a box of used clothes.

programme.title: American Girl
programme.desc: 13 year-old Fen is uprooted from LA and moves to Taipei in early 2003. She struggles to adjust to her new life with a new school and long-separated father.

programme.title: Enter The Fat Dragon
programme.desc: Donnie Yen plays a Hong Kong police officer who is highly skilled in martial arts but balloons to more than 200 pounds after his fiancé left him. He is then assigned a simple task of escorting a criminal to Japan.

programme.title: Cyber Heist
programme.desc: Hackers have caused a large-scale cyber attack and Chun's boss is the mastermind of the attack. When Chun gets trapped in a money laundering operation, he must fight to prove his innocence in the cyber world.

programme.title: Look Up
programme.desc: This film celebrates the 25th anniversary of Hong Kong's Handover in a series of four cultural stories about young Hong Kongers from different walks of life.

programme.title: Snack Attack
programme.desc: Feed the rumble between two meals with one of Chef Ranveer Brar's delicious snack recipes.

programme.title: Apaharan
programme.desc: Story of the tumultuous relationship between a father and son, set amidst the kidnapping industry in Bihar. The son is drawn into crime to repay a loan when his dream of becoming a cop fails.

programme.title: Do Lafzon Ki Kahani
programme.desc: A budding relationship between Sooraj, a boxer with an awful past, and Jenny, a girl with visual impairment, experiences challenges after they discover each other's pasts.

programme.title: Gangaa S3
programme.desc: This is the story of a young child widow named Gangaa, who loses her husband and her father on her wedding day itself. Gangaa's father and her husband are killed in a riot on the bank of river Ganges in Varanasi.

programme.title: Kundali Bhagya
programme.desc: The story of Preeta and Shristhi, sisters whose dying father reveals the truth that their mother is alive and living in Mumbai. Preeta and Shristhi's mother is Sarla Arora and they both are long lost sisters of Pragya.

programme.title: Ishq Subhan Allah S2
programme.desc: Life takes a big turn for them when Kabir and Zara, two staunch followers of Islam who have completely opposite principles and beliefs, cross paths with each other.

The Magnificent Concubine
programme.desc: Yang Gui Fei is the beloved concubine of Emperor. He is besotted with her that he leaves the running of the country to Prime Minister. The Prime Minister is corrupt, causing them to revolt the throne.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: As a scholar and his lover are torn apart forever by his uncle and his friend, and drive the girl to commit suicide. The girl returns as ghost and seek revenge.

programme.title: The Secret Of The Dirk
programme.desc: The inhabitants of the City of Liu are forced to flee when the vicious Black Tigers gang raids their city, but are able to hide all their gold and treasures in a valley.

programme.title: Tales Of A Eunuch
programme.desc: The story follows a 'loveable' rascal as he gambles and gets into various bits of trouble with outlaws and rebels. The whole movie revolves around a quest for all the copies of a special Buddhist text.

programme.title: Na Cha The Great
programme.desc: Chang Cheh's classic adaptation of the popular fantasy stars Fu Sheng in his signature role as legendary super-teen Na Cha, reincarnated to save his people from an evil emperor.

programme.title: The Iron Buddha
programme.desc: After a notorious rapist kills his master and entire clan, the Iron Buddha sets out for revenge. He'll need a magic sword first though, naturally.

programme.title: The House Of 72 Tenants
programme.desc: The 72 inhabitants of a dilapidated tenement live under the thumb of a heartless landlady and her sleazy husband. The arrival of a defiant new tenant however, changes their fate.

programme.title: The Swordmates
programme.desc: Li asks trusted friend Wang to protect his family while he's away, but Wang rapes his wife, kills his servants and has Li's convoy attacked. Li fears his daughter is still in peril!

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: After killing a tiger, Wu Sung is appointed chief constable, but is soon drawn into a tragic love triangle between his ugly brother and her alluring wife, who tries to seduce him.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful young fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealousy and a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black
programme.desc: Set during the Japanese occupation in World War II, a young orphan Tang Qi falls in a love with a young man Chang. However, their love is filled with challenges, from family pressure to the turmoil of war.

programme.title: The Duel Of The Century
programme.desc: A duel has been arranged at the Forbidden City between two formidable swordsmen of the martial world, Ye Gu Cheng and Xi Men Chui Xue. Lu Xiao Feng smells something fishy about the duel.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: When Chang Sun gives stranded Wen Jou a ride home he falls instantly in love. However, her gangster brother, Wen Chiang, takes an instant dislike to Chang, who must fight for love!

programme.title: Twelve Deadly Coins
programme.desc: When Qiao Miao is about to kill the bandit whom he just met, he is attracted by her beauty and they quickly fall in love. The two later discover the blood feud between the owner of the unique weapon.

programme.title: Return Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: Return Of The Phoenix is yet another masterpiece from director Li Han-hsiang. It is a comedy surrounded the upcoming marriage of the imperial minister's daughter.

programme.title: A Place To Call Home
programme.desc: When she discovers she is adopted, Li Ching sets out in search of her real family, and things to go from bad to worse until she finally realizes that there's no place like home.

programme.title: Spring Blossoms
programme.desc: Some of Shaw Brothers' biggest female stars of the 1970s share the screen in this tale of young love and interfering parents, starring Lily Li, Shu Pei Pei and Essie Lin Chia.

programme.title: Whose Baby Is In Classroom?
programme.desc: Chen, a male teacher in an all girls' high school, is stuck with a baby that isn't his and must take care of it. His class helps him take care of it while he works his charm on Li Ching.

programme.title: The Five Venoms
programme.desc: An unparalleled kung-fu masterpiece from the one and only Chang Cheh. The dying Poison Clan master sends his last pupil on a dangerous mission to hunt down the five titular warriors.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: The Mad Monk lends a helping hand to the villagers and teaches all the bad guys a lesson they won't forget. A fun Caper with an underlying moral directed by Li Han-hsiang.

programme.title: The Proud Youth
programme.desc: Ling Hu Chong, a Huashan clan's disciple, is assigned to find the successor to the score 'The Proud One'. Ling identifies Ying for the score but finds out that she is the daughter of the evil clan's leader.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: Alex is happily married to a gynecologist, Tung for five years. When Alex is fatally wounded in an accident, he feels obliged to tell Tung about his affair with Blackie.

programme.title: The Winged Tiger
programme.desc: If the two big villains Winged Tiger and Underworld King join forces, the martial arts world will be plunged into chaos. The union is set to occur with the marriage of the Underworld King's sister and the Winged Tiger.

programme.title: Scandal
programme.desc: As the roguish scamp Zhen and his best friend Chia collected proofs of corruption from the officials, they demanded to become the governor of the country.

programme.title: Legend Of The Bat
programme.desc: Charismatic swordsman Chu Liu Hsiang, whose battlefield exploits rival his bedroom antics, travels to the Island of Bats, where he encounters monks, women and plenty of action!

programme.title: The Merry Wife
programme.desc: Li Ching, a 17-year-old girl who marries her 35-year-old teacher. Comedy ensues when Li decides to go to the same school with her husband but attempting to hide their relationship.

programme.title: The Tea House
programme.desc: Martial arts legend Chan Koon Tai plays a city gang leader, who runs his operation out of a local cafe in this gritty, crime drama from director Kuei Chih Hung.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan and his apprentice Fan transport vampires for a living. When two of them hopped away, it is revealed that one of them is actually a man in disguise trying to escape from his enemies.

programme.title: Chinatown Kid
programme.desc: Alexander Fu Sheng flees to San Francisco after he is framed for drug possession. He assists Philip Kwok's notorious White Dragons in a vicious gang war, only to then be betrayed.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Chang Cheh's The Water Margin is the martial arts epic of epics. Based on the true legend of how 108 rebels in the mountains were able to repeatedly defeat invading Sung armies.

programme.title: Hong Kong Rhapsody
programme.desc: Hong Kong Rhapsody is a musical extravaganza full of song and dance. Peter Chen-Ho stars as a playboy magician who changes his ways after he becomes the guardian of a young singer.

programme.title: The Swift Knight
programme.desc: It's tale of brave knights, chivalry and fair maidens where the Swift Knight finds himself involved in romance, court intrigue and deadly jousts while trying to protect a baby who is the Emperor's secret heir apparent.

programme.title: Love With The Perfect Stranger
programme.desc: After breaking up with his girlfriend, salesman Bao meets a rich girl, Jin Jin, who just broke up with her boyfriend. Two equally heartbroken strangers fall in love instantly and get married on impulse.

programme.title: The Bells Of Death
programme.desc: Amidst fountains of blood and guts, The Bells Of Death is a whirlwind story about a man embarking on a lifes journey to learn the sword, then gain revenge on the three men who killed his family and abducted his sister.

programme.title: Pale Passion
programme.desc: In Pale Passion, Chin Ping-hsings only directed film, the gorgeous Chiang Li-ping plays a scorned wife Ah Hsia in an unsettling tale about cheating, adultery and blatant abuse, which develops into a deadly love triangle.

programme.title: A Taste Of Cold Steel
programme.desc: It's a no-holds-barred battle to the death for possession of the invaluable Purple Sword. Assistant director Wang Po-yi also wrote this entertaining and exciting adventure.

programme.title: Song Of Orchid Island
programme.desc: Paul Chang Chung plays Dr. Ho, who decides to move to a backward island off the coast of Taiwan to look for his missing father.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Mongolian emperor Kublai Khan is being assassinated while meeting with the Italian explorer Marco Polo. Marco Polo is appointed to lead the troops for the emperor to wipe out the anti-Mongol rebels.

programme.title: Carry On Doctors And Nurses
programme.desc: Director Chan Friend created this delightful variation on the British 'Carry On!' film series. It can certainly make you laugh with all the comical acts happened in the Hospital!

programme.title: Reincarnated Swordsman
programme.desc: A Wu Dang disciple Fu, kills the chief of Wu Dang Clan and frames it on the chief's illegitimate child, Yun. Fu then proclaims himself the new chief and orders the killing of Yun, who vows to avenge his father's death.

programme.title: Human Lanterns
programme.desc: Zhao was once defeated by Long in a duel. 7 years later, however, Long asks Zhao to make a unique lantern on his behalf for winning the lantern contest. At the same time, Zhao plans for revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Buddha
programme.desc: Jeanette Lin Tsui stars as a female James Bond in an adventure brimming with beautiful girls, secret weapons and exotic locations as she goes up against a dastardly villain.

programme.title: Two Con Men
programme.desc: A wonderfully twisted, pseudo-romantic comedy starring Liang Tien and Chang Ying in an age-old competition between rookie con artist versus the ultimate, experienced flimflam man.

programme.title: Songfest
programme.desc: Shot on location at Taiwan's beautiful Sun-Moon Lake, it's the turbulent romance of a passionate tea picker and a debonair fisherman.

programme.title: Return To The 36th Chamber
programme.desc: The second film of the trilogy, Gordon Liu plays Zhou Ren Jie, a man who impersonates a monk in order to learn kung fu in Shaolin, and eventually creates his own Shaolin style of 'scaffolding kung fu'.

programme.title: The Knight Of Knights
programme.desc: Wen Su Chen, the leader of seven knights, sends his six sworn brothers to investigate a monastery. Unfortunately, they are killed by an abbot who plans to murder Inspector Lin.

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: A rich girl Yue Ying, together with her maid Chun Lan, encounter a poor scholar Bian Ji at a fete. Chun Lan realizes Yue Ying is in love with him, but mixes his identity with a bandit due to an old servant's confusion.

programme.title: The Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: Wang Yu plays a noble martial arts student, whose master and peers are murdered by Lo Lieh's bloodthirsty karate expert, and embarks on a tough training regime to avenge them.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: The story is based on a famous Chinese opera. A young impoverished scholar, Zhang, is enchanted by Hong, the daughter of an influential family whom he meets in a temple.

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: Several years before GHOSTBUSTERS was a massive Hollywood hit, Wong Jing scripted this hilarious supernatural action comedy starring Alexander Fu and directed by Lau Ka Wing.

programme.title: The 5 Billion Dollar Legacy
programme.desc: Three girls travel to Japan to collect an unexpected inheritance, only to be met by three guys there to do the same. So begins a vicious battle to receive what was promised them.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master named 'Shadow Whip', he is suspected and hunted.

programme.title: The Mad Monk Strikes Again
programme.desc: The Mad Monk is up against the equally legendary scholar-turned-genie, Lu Tung Pin. The duo create havoc as they vie with each other, be it in mirth, magic, women or weapons!

programme.title: King Eagle
programme.desc: Chang Cheh directs an early incarnation of Ti Lung's lone swordsman in this kung-fu classic. King Eagle crosses blades with the Tongs after falling for Li Ching's beautiful Chief.

programme.title: Fangs Of The Cobra
programme.desc: This unique thriller betrays its ominous title by telling the story of a heroic and virtuous serpent who unearths traps, battles a baby-eating rodent and even wards off rival gangs.

programme.title: Temple Of The Red Lotus
programme.desc: A young kid heads off to Dragon Valley to meet the childhood friend who was promised as his bride. When he gets there, he finds that the family of the bride might not be an entirely honest bunch of people though.

programme.title: Flying Dragon Leaping Tiger
programme.desc: Lu the horse thief is betrayed by his best mate Qiao and is separated from his son. For 20 years, Lu searches for his wife until one day, his missing son meets Qiao's daughter and they fall in love.

programme.title: Iron Squad S2, Ep 10
programme.desc: This Korean military survival show brings eight Special Force units together to compete in extreme missions that will test their physical stamina, mental strength and teamwork!

programme.title: Iron Ball, Ep 12
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge dodgeball. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 S2, Ep 8
programme.desc: The new season brings twenty two Thai superstars into a merciless boxing competition, with a special first ever Thai female match showcasing women's incredible spirit!

programme.title: Yacht...: The Beginning, Ep 10
programme.desc: In the second season, a group of celebrities takes on the challenge of sailing a yacht, they have to overcome rigorous training before finally mastering it and enjoying the exciting voyage.

programme.title: The Fishermen & Sea S3, Ep 18
programme.desc: This is a fishing entertainment program featuring celebrities who enjoy fishing and give them opportunity to visit beautiful, secret fishing spots and having bonding time.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: A military veteran, Wu Wei and an undercover cop, Tian Ming lead a team to rescue the hostages captured by a band of thugs in an island outside of Bangkok.

programme.title: Hangout With Yoo, Ep 101
programme.desc: This popular Korean variety show stars MC Yoo Jae Seok. In each episode, celebrity guests join Yoo to perform different tasks and challenges. Hanging out with Yoo will certainly make you laugh very hard!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation, Ep 5
programme.desc: Welcome to The Ultimate BROcation. A hilarious reality show about four celebrities on an all-expenses paid, tailor-made vacation for 'bros'!

programme.title: Sang Pencerah
programme.desc: The journey of an Indonesian national hero named K.H. Ahmad Dahlan striving for Muhammadiyah and how he was rejected by the society as he was trying to fix up their perspective.

programme.title: Gentayangan
programme.desc: After being declared bankrupt by the court, Abimanyu Karindra has no choice but to bring his wife, their two children and his sister Sheila to settle in a parent's hotel in a mountain valley.

programme.title: Kawin Kontrak Lagi
programme.desc: Jody intends to marry a girl, but he faces a lot of obstacles as Bos Maung continually hinders his efforts.

programme.title: Marina
programme.desc: Anton SH, a young lawyer, marries Marina and asks his wife not to get pregnant. However, their married life is falling apart as Marina becomes a successful singer and Anton's career is ruined.

programme.title: Tabah Sampai Akhir
programme.desc: Three orphans go to Jakarta to look for their uncle. After manage to find their uncle, they involved in an accident that causes the uncle to die and leaves each of them with a disability.

programme.title: Ponirah Terpidana
programme.desc: Ponirah, who is regarded as bad luck for her family, is seduced by a pimp to work as a prostitute in Jakarta. She then determined to be the most expensive courtesan.

programme.title: Ummi Aminah
programme.desc: Follows the life of Ummi Aminah, a 68 years old ustadzah who has seven children and loyal congregation.

programme.title: Daerah Terlarang
programme.desc: That evening Reza, Denny, Lin, and Desy go to Puncak for shooting horror film. When passing through a haunted house, their car brakes down. They are then terrorized by pocong, the keepers of the haunted house.

programme.title: Melodi Cinta Rhoma Irama
programme.desc: Rhoma falls in love with Ricca and plan a wedding. However, their love is interrupted by Herman, who also loves Ricca and wants to control Ricca's father's property.

programme.title: Cowok Bikin Pusing
programme.desc: This movie tells the story about a pair of young love who once hurt by their former lovers. They finally fall in love and must overcome obstacles threatening their relationship.

programme.title: Abdullah Dan Takeshi
programme.desc: A story of two boys who were born in a hospital in Japan and exchanged. The baby from the Arab descent was raised by a Japanese family, while the baby of Japanese descent was raised by the Arab family.

programme.title: Suami-Suami Takut Istri
programme.desc: The Griya Mintari wives travel to Bali with their husbands to watch the Trio Ganas' performance. Funny things start to take place as the husbands try to sneak their way to date the singers.

programme.title: Kirun+Adul Pengen Punya...
programme.desc: The president's daughter, Gita, takes advantage of two men, Kirun and Adul, to unleash her anger against her father. Yet, when Gita is kidnapped, the two men are accused as the felons.

programme.title: Hijab
programme.desc: Story about four friends Anin, Bia, Tata and Sari who decided to build a Hijab business and succeeding. With their income exceeding their husbands, the harmony of their household began to be tested.

programme.title: El
programme.desc: A high school girl named Dafychi bumped into a successful businessman named Mario. After that incident, Mario grew closer into Dafychi. Little did Mario know, that Dafychi had a personality disorder.

programme.title: Menggapai Matahari 2
programme.desc: This sequel of Menggapai Matahari continues the rivalry between Rhoma Irama and Beny Compo. Not only want to destroy Rhoma Irama's music career, Beny also want to physically harm him.

programme.title: Kawin Kontrak 3
programme.desc: Gerry replaces Kang Sono as a contract marriage broker. Ceppy, Itol, and Dani finally marry their dream women and start their new unique lives.
